name: detect-picker-owns-input-state6-mid-turn-busy
comment: Real captured state (see conformance/picker-screens/screens2.json, label 6-mid-turn-busy, which kept the raw unfiltered grid so this fixture's indices need no reconstruction). The live empty input row is present, cursor visible on it, while claude works; queuing a follow-up mid-turn is legitimate and must not be refused.
